   865|CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.ivx_is_owner()
   866|RETURNS boolean
   867|LANGUAGE sql
   868|SECURITY DEFINER
   869|SET search_path = public
   870|AS $ivx$
   871|  SELECT auth.uid() IS NOT NULL
   872|    AND EXISTS (
   873|      SELECT 1
   874|      FROM public.profiles
   875|      WHERE id = auth.uid()
   876|        AND regexp_replace(lower(coalesce(role, 'investor')), '[^a-z0-9]+', '', 'g') IN ('owner', 'owneradmin', 'ivxowner', 'developer', 'dev', 'admin', 'superadmin', 'administrator', 'founder', 'staff', 'staffmember', 'ceo', 'manager', 'analyst', 'support')
   877|    );
   878|$ivx$;
